text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for Narita Taishin's debut race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, she seems very uneasy.
choice_data_list: Want to do some breathing exercises with me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Bug off. I'm not scared or anything. Got it?

text_block_list.name: Race Attendant
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin! Please make your way to the
paddock!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh... Right, okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, see ya later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she leaves, I can see her legs are trembling
ever so slightly.
choice_data_list: (What can I do to encourage her?)
(What can I do to encourage her?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spectators crowd about, eager to catch a glimpse
of the Umamusume in the paddock who may one
day become legends in their own right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Narita Taishin standing among her fellow
racers.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's up with that one over there? She's
pretty darn tiny...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Does she even stand a chance with that stature?
Seems like she could get blown away.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
I-Is she going to be okay? I hope she doesn't get
hurt...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one seems to expect much from her. She
hangs her head down amid the murmuring voices
whirling around her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No one can deny that her lack of height is a
disadvantage when it comes to racing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
"You're too short!" "You're too frail!" "You're not
cut out to be a racer!"

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All that junk—I'm sick and tired of hearing it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Okay?! I don't care what people say! I'm gonna
stay right on the turf! I'll show all you whiny
morons!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll show you exactly where I should be!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be laughing when I tell you to shove it
from the winner's circle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is stronger and more determined to
win than anyone, and she has the ability to make
all her declarations come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As her trainer, I know this better than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm shouting before I realize what I'm doing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, stop yelling! Seriously!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Geez, what are we doing? We should be cheering
her on. It's her debut, after all.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Go get 'em, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: We're behind you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Look what that idiot started!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
First, I'm going to win, then I'm kicking that
doofus to the other side of the world!
